project_type: Static HTML website for insurance product showcase (Project Cuan 3.0)
build_system: None - static files served directly. No build step needed.
test_framework: Manual validation - open HTML file in browser. No automated test framework.
verification_instructions: 1. Check that miprecious.html exists in public/pages/ 2. Validate HTML structure is well-formed 3. Verify calculator JavaScript produces correct outputs based on specs
setup_instructions: No setup needed - project is plain HTML/CSS/JS static files
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible. All work is plain HTML/CSS/JS.
contribution_requirements: Pages follow the design system in /assets/style.css and use component loader from /assets/main.js to load header.html and footer.html dynamically.
key_patterns:
1. Each page uses and at end of body. 2. Pages have a
placeholder that gets filled by main.js loading /components/header.html. 3. Pages use question-style headings with colored keyword spans (.kw, .kw-cta, .kw-blue, .kw-purple, .kw-gold). 4. Dark mode support via html.dark class. 5. Product-specific CSS variables defined in page-level
relevant_files: public/pages/msp.html (reference for page structure, design patterns, calculator UI)
public/assets/style.css (design system with CSS variables, utilities, components)
public/assets/main.js (component loader, dark mode, search, scroll)
Sample/Miprecious.html (source content and original calculator logic)
directory_structure: public/ - served static files; public/pages/ - product pages; public/assets/ - CSS and JS; public/components/ - reusable header/footer; Sample/ - reference content files; Source/ - PDF source documents
